titleStmt.title: SII 41.256: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 256. (A.R. No. 474 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

summary.p: Records endowment of 1,000 pudukkāsu for three lamps by Paḻaiyanūr-uḍaiyān Vēdavanamuḍaiyān Ammaiyappa[n] Pallavarāyan. The money was given through one Kūḻāṇḍār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kaṭal cūḻnta pārmātarum kalaimātarum Aṭal cūḻnta pormātarum cirmātarum Amarntuvāḻa nāṟkaṭalcūḻ puvieḻum pāṟkkaṭal cūḻ pukaḻparappi Āti Ukamāmenṉac cotimuṭi puṉaintaruḷi Aṟucamaiyamum jampūtamum neṟiyininṟu pārkkiṭappattenṉavaruñ ceralaruñ ciṅkaḷarum mutalāya manṉavarkaḷ tiṟaitavintu vantiṇṭic cevippa Ūḻi Ūḻi Oru ceṅkol Eḻupārum Initaḷippac cempon virasimhāsanattu Ulakuṭaimukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripaṟmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravarttikaḷ maturaiyumiḻamuṅkoṇṭaruḷiṉa
śrī rājātirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu mel malaippaḻaiyanūr nāṭṭup paḻaiyanūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiyār koyilil Aṇṭamuṟa nimirntāṭiyaruḷiṉa nāyanār tirumunpu Ittevar tevatānam paḻaiyanūrp paḻaiyanūruṭaiyān vetavaṉamuṭaiyānammaiyappan pallavarāyaneṉ vaitta tirinuntāviḷakku muṉṟum paḻaiyanūruṭaiyān vetavaṉāmuṭaiyān karuṇākaran vaitta tirinuntāviḷakkonṟum Āka viḷakku nālum Ivviḷakku nālukkumikkoyil civappirāmaṇaril kāśyapan tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉum kau
śikantiruvālaṅkāṭapaṭṭaṉum kāśyapan Urudra paṭṭaṉum Ātraiyan candracekarapaṭṭanum gautaman dakṣiṇāmurtti paṭṭanum kāśyapan vaṉanāyaka paṭṭaṉum kāśyapanpūtipaṭṭaṉum kauśikan śrīkaṇṭhaṉātha paṭṭanum kāśyapan cāntapaṭṭanum kāśyapan śrī kaṇṭanātanum Ivvaṉaivom pon koṇṭu poliyūṭṭāka nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa putukkācu Āyiramum kaikkoṇṭu viḷakkonṟukku Arumoḻitevan Uḻakkāl viḷakku nālukku ney nāḻiyāka vanta ney koṇṭu candrātittavarai celuttakkaṭavomānom tiruvuṇāḻikai sabhaiyom It
tirunan=tāviḷakku nālukkum Āṇṭār kūḻāṇṭār pakkal nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭa putukkācu Āyiramum kaik koṇṭom Ivvanaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭan Eḻuttu kāśyapan ṉāyaka paṭṭan Eḻuttu kāśyapan pūtipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu kaucikan śrī kaṇṭanātha paṭṭan Eḻuttu kauśikan tiruvālaṅkāṭa paṭṭan Eḻuttu kāśyapan Urudrapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ātraiyan candracekarapaṭṭan Eḻuttu gautaman dakṣiṇāmurtti paṭṭan Eḻuttu kāśyapan cāntapaṭṭan Eḻuttu kāśyapan śrī kaṇṭhanātha paṭṭan Eḻuttu Itu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 41.256 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
